title: The Village Realizes It Is Free
description: On pages 10–13, the village realizes it is free focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.
scene: On pages 10–13, the village realizes it is free focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Go ahead! Lay eben one binger on me 18 yu dare! I swear yu won't get away width!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is his mouth still alive...?

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: This is for shooting Nojiko,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And defiling Belliemere's Orange Fields...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Shanks, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I feel better already!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He still needs about 1000 more beatings!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Buhaaa!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now go clean up after the fishermen! Then help rebuild Gosa village!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And you're not to touch any of the money left here in Arlong Park!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's this island's money alone!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And one more thing!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Owww Qwww Qwwww! I'll do whuder you say!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Give me back my money!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I will, I will!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Listen well, you rotten pirates! Especially you, strawhat-boy! You said your name was luffy, didn't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And you're the captain, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let me just say that you're gonna get your just desserts for angering me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I swear I'll get back at you for this!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He said you're gonna get your just deserts.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How'd he know that I deserve to be the pirate King?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's not what he meant, dumbass.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: W-what do we do, guys!? What happens if he really does get back at us!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to think we'd be saved by pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You just never know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: two

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Alright, guys! We can't just hog all the good news for ourselves!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's go tell everyone on the island...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That Arlong Park is no more!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
